name: eval-3-chain-to-next-skill
context_setup: User has just completed a scribe-to-spec session and has a generated solution design document for a candidate intake automation.
query: Now harden this design doc before I hand it to a dev.
expected_behavior: Recognizes the chain trigger — the user wants to harden the output of scribe-to-spec
Does NOT re-run scribe-to-spec (the spec is already generated)
Hands off to design-doc-review with the generated spec as input
Passes enough context to design-doc-review: the spec, the original Scribe process it came from, and any open questions that were flagged during scribe-to-spec's Phase 3
design-doc-review then runs its 7-phase pipeline on the spec
If the user says instead 'now turn this into a Dispatch plan': chains to architect-plan-for-dispatch instead of design-doc-review
failure_modes_to_check: Re-runs scribe-to-spec from scratch instead of chaining
Loses the context from the original scribe-to-spec session (open questions, assumptions) when handing off
Does not offer the chain option proactively at the end of scribe-to-spec — forces the user to ask
